bead.title: Stage 1.8: update FEAT-002, FEAT-020, SD-019 (partial edits)
bead.description: Update three specs with partial edits (not full rewrites): docs/helix/01-frame/features/FEAT-002-server.md, docs/helix/01-frame/features/FEAT-020-server-node-state.md, docs/helix/02-design/solution-designs/SD-019-multi-project-server-topology.md. Swap 'React frontend fetches...' sentences to 'SvelteKit frontend queries via GraphQL...'. Add /graphql endpoint alongside REST in interface sections. See docs/plan-svelte-migration.md Stage 1 bead #8.
bead.acceptance: (1) All three files edited. (2) No React/TanStack references remain in any of them. (3) Each now mentions /graphql endpoint alongside existing /api/* references.
